title: 5 Pairs Japanese Natural Bamboo Chopsticks with Unique Pattern Dishwasher Safe, Reusable Non-Slip Chopstick Gift Set for Asian Dishes Sushi Rice Noodles, Nicely Boxed Chinese Chop Sticks
features: 【Quality Material】Our Japanese style chopsticks from YTZJ Direct are made of all-natural quality bamboo with smooth surface, which is safe and healthy, classy and sturdy; Also they are nicely packaged for gifting, great value for money.

【Easy to Use】8.85-Inch/22.5CM length is easy and comfortable to grip, beginners can also use them very well; Square handle design won't roll away on the table easily, and antislip tip with grooves makes it much easier to pick up food; Also each pair with unique attractive prints to distinguish.
【Washable and Reusable】These simple and nice chopsticks are dishwasher safe, also hand-wash with soft sponge recommended, easy to clean and dry, it's very durable for long time reuse.

【Wide Applications】These quality boxed chopsticks are lightweight and portable, suitable for noodles, ramen, dumplings, eastern dishes, sushi, sashimi, rice, hotpot, shabu-shabu, Korean BBQ etc.; Also good for home kitchen, hotel, restaurant, party, camping, picnic or travel.

【Practical Gift】These elegant chopsticks are decorated with beautiful patterns and decent quality, great gift to family and friends, your best choice for housewarming, wedding celebration, Christmas, birthday, anniversary, etc.
【Good Value】Comes with 5 pairs of long lifetime chopsticks gift set with a nice presentation in a box to meet your daily family meals and party needs, great value for money.
description: Specifications: Material: Natural Bamboo Color: Brown+Blue Length: 8.85 inch/22.5cm Quantity: 5 Pairs Healthy Chopsticks with Nice Design Features: 1. Lightweight, easy and comfortable to use 2. Solid bamboo constructed, sturdy and durable 3. Finely polished and smooth surface 4. Reusable and Environment-friendly 5. Dishwasher safe and handwash recommended Package: 5 Pairs x Nonslip Bamboo Chopsticks in a gift box
